subtitle.en: Tap true or false before the timer runs out
subtitle.zh: 在時間用完前點真或假

tagline.en: Twelve Cloudflare claims — spot the true ones before the clock beats you.
tagline.zh: 十二句關於 Cloudflare 的說法，在時間到之前抓出真的那些。

text.en: Cloudflare Workers run at the edge, close to your users.
text.zh: Cloudflare Workers 在邊緣執行，靠近你的使用者。

explain.en: Workers run in Cloudflare's global edge network, so code executes near each visitor.
explain.zh: Workers 在 Cloudflare 的全球邊緣網路執行，程式碼會在離訪客最近的地方跑。

text.en: R2 charges egress fees every time you download a file.
text.zh: R2 每次下載檔案都要收流出費。

explain.en: R2 has zero egress fees — that's its headline advantage over other object stores.
explain.zh: R2 流出免費，這正是它勝過其他物件儲存的招牌特色。

text.en: Workers KV is strongly consistent, so a write appears everywhere instantly.
text.zh: Workers KV 是強一致的，所以寫入會立刻在各地出現。

explain.en: KV is eventually consistent; updates can take a short time to reach every edge location.
explain.zh: KV 是最終一致，更新可能要過一小段時間才會傳到每個邊緣節點。

text.en: D1 is Cloudflare's serverless SQL database.
text.zh: D1 是 Cloudflare 的無伺服器 SQL 資料庫。

explain.en: D1 is a SQLite-based SQL database you query with familiar SQL statements.
explain.zh: D1 以 SQLite 為基礎，你可以用熟悉的 SQL 語法查詢它。

text.en: Durable Objects provide strong consistency for coordinating state.
text.zh: Durable Objects 為協調狀態提供強一致性。

explain.en: Each Durable Object is a single authoritative instance, giving strong consistency for its state.
explain.zh: 每個 Durable Object 都是唯一的權威實例，因此它的狀態具有強一致性。

text.en: To run Workers you must rent and manage your own servers.
text.zh: 要執行 Workers，你必須自己租用並管理伺服器。

explain.en: Workers are serverless — Cloudflare runs and scales them for you, no servers to manage.
explain.zh: Workers 是無伺服器的，Cloudflare 幫你執行與擴展，不用自己管伺服器。

text.en: Wrangler is the command-line tool for building and deploying Workers.
text.zh: Wrangler 是用來建置與部署 Workers 的命令列工具。

explain.en: Wrangler is the official CLI for creating, developing, and deploying Workers projects.
explain.zh: Wrangler 是官方 CLI，用來建立、開發與部署 Workers 專案。

text.en: KV is the best place to store large video files.
text.zh: KV 是存放大型影片檔的最佳選擇。

explain.en: KV is for small key-value data; large files belong in R2 object storage instead.
explain.zh: KV 適合小型的鍵值資料；大型檔案應該放在 R2 物件儲存。

text.en: Cloudflare's CDN caches content close to users to speed up load times.
text.zh: Cloudflare 的 CDN 把內容快取到使用者附近，加快載入速度。

explain.en: The CDN stores copies at edge locations worldwide so content loads from nearby.
explain.zh: CDN 在全球邊緣節點存放副本，讓內容能就近載入。

text.en: Cloudflare Pages is a relational database service.
text.zh: Cloudflare Pages 是一種關聯式資料庫服務。

explain.en: Pages deploys websites and frontends; for a SQL database you'd use D1.
explain.zh: Pages 是用來部署網站與前端的；要 SQL 資料庫應該用 D1。

text.en: Cloudflare offers unlimited DDoS protection on every plan, including Free.
text.zh: Cloudflare 在每種方案都提供無限 DDoS 防護，包含免費方案。

explain.en: Unmetered DDoS mitigation is included for all customers, even on the Free plan.
explain.zh: 不限量的 DDoS 防護對所有客戶都包含在內，連免費方案也有。

text.en: Workers can only be written in Python; JavaScript is not supported.
text.zh: Workers 只能用 Python 寫，不支援 JavaScript。

explain.en: Workers fully support JavaScript and TypeScript, with Python and Rust available too.
explain.zh: Workers 完整支援 JavaScript 與 TypeScript，也可以用 Python 與 Rust。
